name: Festive Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the broken nut meats and brown sugar together and set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining ingredients: flour, white sugar, salt, and fruit cocktail.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch by 9-inch pan.
4. Sprinkle the top with the brown sugar/nut mixture.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
6. Serve topped with whipped cream or ice cream.
